issue.body:
> **Reporting period:** 2026-03-02 → 2026-04-01 | **Scope:** Public, non-archived repos with activity in the last 30 days --- ## 🔥 Highlights - **New repo launched:** [`SortAlgorithms`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms) (C#) created 2026-03-24 — sort implementations with benchmarks and CI; dependabot PR already merged. - **Agentic workflows landed in `githubactions-lab`:** LLM CI ([PR #306](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/306)) merged + agentic workflow support added today. - **`local-provisioner` extended:** `kubectl` and `gh` CLI added to provisioner today. - **Dependency hygiene across the board:** Dependabot is active and up-to-date on all major repos. --- ## 📦 Active Repositories (30-day window) ### 1. [githubactions-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab) ⭐55 **CI Lab | Go | Very active** | Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | Open PRs | [#305](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/305) — Dependabot bump (dorny/paths-filter 3→4, create-github-app-token 2→3) | | Recent merges | [#306](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/306) `ci: llm` (2026-04-01), [#304](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/304) dep bump (2026-03-18) | | Open issues | 3 ([#308](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/308) today's daily report, [#307](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/307) workflow failure, [#8](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/8)/[#7](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/7) playground samples) | | Latest release | `2025.12.14` (Dec 2025 — 3.5 months stale) | Key commits: `feat: add agentic workflow`, `feat: oss repositories status`, `fix: expand timeout`, `chore: remove push trigger` --- ### 2. [SortAlgorithms](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms) ⭐1 🆕 **New repo | C# | Active** - Created 2026-03-24; initial sort implementations committed. - Tree sort enhanced with arena memory tracking (2026-03-29–30). - CI benchmarks auto-update README via GitHub Actions. - Dependabot PR [#1](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms/pull/1) merged (create-github-app-token 2→3). - No releases yet. --- ### 3. [local-provisioner](https://github.com/guitarrapc/local-provisioner) ⭐18 **Shell | Active today** - Added `kubectl` and `gh` to provisioner (2026-04-01). - Path and root-copy fixes applied. - No open issues or PRs. --- ### 4. [kubernetes-manifest-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/kubernetes-manifest-lab) **GitOps | Auto-updated** - Manifest auto-synced from `githubactions-lab` PR #306 merge (2026-04-01). - All commits are bot-driven ([automate] workflow). No manual issues or PRs. --- ### 5. [ClrProfiler](https://github.com/guitarrapc/ClrProfiler) ⭐9 **C# .NET EventListener metrics | Dependency updates only** - Merged: `actions/upload-artifact` 6→7 (2026-03-16), `actions/download-artifact` 7→8 (2026-03-31). - No feature PRs or issues in the period. - Latest release: `1.1.0` (Sep 2025 — 6+ months stale). --- ### 6. [hatenablog-theme-codefocus](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus) ⭐4 **JS blog theme | Active** - `.npmrc` configuration added (2026-03-31). - Dependabot: picomatch (Mar 26), actions/setup-node 6.2→6.3 (Mar 22). - Open issue: [#80](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus/issues/80) — "Favicon for inline links" (2026-03-02, new in this period). - 2 total open issues. --- ### 7. [SkiaSharp.QrCode](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode) ⭐224 🔑 **High-traffic | C# | Popular** - **4 open issues** — 2 new in this period (content filtered by integrity policy; requires manual review). - No PRs or commits in the past 30 days. - Latest release: `0.12.0` (Nov 2025 — 4+ months stale). - Most starred/forked repo (224 ⭐, 44 forks). --- ### 8. [csharp-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/csharp-lab) ⭐3 **C# playground | CI dep bumps only** - 8 open issues (all pre-dating this period — backlog items like JWT auth, .NET features, OpenTelemetry). - No new activity on issues in the period. --- ### 9. Other repos with dependency-only activity | Repo | Stars | Activity | |------|-------|----------| | [dotfiles-linux](https://github.com/guitarrapc/dotfiles-linux) | 1 | Updated 2026-04-01 (dep bumps) | | [AgonesSdkCsharp](https://github.com/guitarrapc/AgonesSdkCsharp) | 3 | Dep bump 2026-03-31 | | [cloudfrontfunctions-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/cloudfrontfunctions-lab) | 0 | Dep bump 2026-03-31 | | [blog.guitarrapc.com](https://github.com/guitarrapc/blog.guitarrapc.com) | 0 | Updated 2026-03-31 | | [DotfilesLinker](https://github.com/guitarrapc/DotfilesLinker) | 0 | Dep bump 2026-03-30 | | [docker-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-lab) | 1 | Updated 2026-03-26, 1 open issue | | [docker-jmeter-gui](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-jmeter-gui) | 12 | Updated 2026-03-25 | | [InMemoryServerClient](https://github.com/guitarrapc/InMemoryServerClient) | 2 | Updated 2026-03-24 | | [argocd-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/argocd-lab) | 0 | Updated 2026-03-23 | | [scoop-bucket](https://github.com/guitarrapc/scoop-bucket) | 2 | Updated 2026-03-31, 1 open issue | | [UnityBuildRunner](https://github.com/guitarrapc/UnityBuildRunner) | 25 | Updated 2026-03-03, 1 open issue | --- ## 📊 Projects Status Summary | Repo | Stars | Open Issues | Open PRs | Last Release | Status | |------|-------|-------------|----------|--------------|--------| | [githubactions-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab) | 55 | 3 | 1 | Dec 2025 | 🟡 Release pending | | [SortAlgorithms](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms) | 1 | 0 | 0 | None | 🟢 Active | | [SkiaSharp.QrCode](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode) | 224 | 4 | 0 | Nov 2025 | 🟡 Issues need triage | | [ClrProfiler](https://github.com/guitarrapc/ClrProfiler) | 9 | 0 | 0 | Sep 2025 | 🟡 Stale release | | [UnityBuildRunner](https://github.com/guitarrapc/UnityBuildRunner) | 25 | 1 | 0 | Oct 2023 | 🔴 Very stale | | [hatenablog-theme-codefocus](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus) | 4 | 2 | 0 | — | 🟢 Active | | [local-provisioner](https://github.com/guitarrapc/local-provisioner) | 18 | 0 | 0 | — | 🟢 Active | | [csharp-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/csharp-lab) | 3 | 8 | 0 | — | 🟡 Backlog | --- ## ⚠️ Suspicious / Notable Activities - **`SkiaSharp.QrCode` issues #294 & #296** — 2 issues in this period were blocked from reading by integrity policy (untrusted external content). **These require manual review** to determine if they are legitimate bug reports, feature requests, or spam/injection attempts. → [Open issues list](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues) - **`githubactions-lab` issue #307** — Workflow failure for Daily Repo Status Report earlier today. The workflow has since recovered. - **Bot activity is high but expected:** `github-actions[bot]`, `dependabot[bot]`, and `guitarrapc-github-actions-bot[bot]` account for the majority of commits across all repos — consistent with established GitOps and CI automation patterns. --- ## ✅ Actionable Next Steps 1. **[githubactions-lab] Merge [PR #305](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/305)** — Dependabot bump for `dorny/paths-filter` and `create-github-app-token`. No known blockers. 2. **[githubactions-lab] Consider cutting a new release** — Significant features since `2025.12.14`: LLM CI, agentic workflows, signed commit actions. 3. **[SkiaSharp.QrCode] Triage issues [#294](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/294) & [#296](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/296)** — New issues blocked by integrity policy; manual review needed. 4. **[SkiaSharp.QrCode] Consider a release** — Latest `0.12.0` is 4+ months old; community demand likely. 5. **[ClrProfiler] Consider a release** — `1.1.0` is 6+ months old; CI dep bumps have landed since then. 6. **[UnityBuildRunner] Evaluate maintenance status** — Last release Oct 2023, 1 open issue. Consider archiving or updating. 7. **[hatenablog-theme-codefocus] Review [issue #80](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus/issues/80)** — Favicon for inline links feature request (new this period). 8. **[SortAlgorithms] Create initial release** when implementations are stable enough. 9. **[csharp-lab] Backlog triage** — 8 open issues; determine which are still relevant (JWT auth, .NET new features, OpenTelemetry, etc.). --- *Generated by Monthly OSS Repo Status workflow · [Run #23839494897](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/actions/runs/23839494897) · 2026-04-01* > [!NOTE] >
> 🔒 Integrity filter blocked 2 items > > The following items were blocked because they don't meet the GitHub integrity level. > > - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#296 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved". > - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#294 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved". > > To allow these resources, lower `min-integrity` in your GitHub frontmatter: > > ```yaml > tools: > github: > min-integrity: approved # merged | approved | unapproved | none > ``` > >
> Generated by [Monthly OSS Repo Status Report](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/actions/runs/23839494897/agentic_workflow) · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3Aguitarrapc%2Fgithubactions-lab+is%3Aissue+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+guitarrapc%2Fgithubactions-lab%2Fmonthly-oss-repo-status%22&type=issues)
issue.title: [oss status] Monthly OSS Repo Status — April 2026 (Mar 2 – Apr 1)
